title: Storage retention policy compliance review
difficulty_justification: Requires cross-referencing aggregate storage utilization trends with the 90-day retention policy, and projecting whether archived data is meeting compliance timelines.
query_text: Is our overall scratch storage utilization on track with the 90-day retention policy? Identify any risk of policy violations and what remediation is needed.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Current scratch usage is 387/500 TB (77.4%). The 90-day retention policy requires automatic archival of files not accessed in 90 days. proj_climate is in grace period (expires 2026-03-16) — policy compliance risk if PI does not reduce usage. Recommended actions: (1) trigger automated archival sweep for files older than 90 days across /lustre/scratch; (2) contact proj_climate PI immediately regarding grace period expiry tomorrow; (3) verify last archival sweep ran successfully and check archival job logs.

checkpoints.description: Agent cites the 90-day retention policy from docs.
Agent identifies proj_climate grace period as compliance risk.
